name: Aura Minerals Inc.
description: Aura Minerals Inc. is a mid-tier gold and copper production company focused on operating and developing mines across the Americas, with producing assets in Brazil, Mexico, Honduras, and Guatemala. The company operates six mines including Aranzazu (copper-gold-silver, Mexico), Apoena, Almas, Borborema, Minosa, and Mineração Serra Grande, primarily in Brazil. Aura is a growth-stage producer actively expanding its portfolio through acquisitions and development of advanced-stage projects.
